record.field: Look up member information by name or ID
Look up John Smith Find member Sarah What's Test8's information? Show me details for Mike Who is Jane Doe?
Look up members AND CRM leads by phone number (searches both dojo.member and crm.lead)
Who has phone number 555-1234? What member has this number: (408) 867-5309 Look up +1 555 123 4567 Find the student with number 555-0112 Who does this number belong to? Search by phone 4085551234
List classes/sessions for a given date
What classes are on today? List all classes for Friday Show me Monday's classes What sessions do we have this week?
What's the schedule today? Show today's classes What classes are happening now? What's on the schedule? What do we have today?
Look up a member's current belt rank. Use member_name to get a specific member's rank; omit it to list all belt ranks.
What belt is John on? Show me Sarah's belt rank What rank is Test8? What color belt does Mike have? What belt does john smith have? Show all belt ranks
Look up a member's subscription status

What's John's subscription status? Is Sarah's membership active? Check Test8's plan Does Mike have an active subscription? What plan is Jane on? What's John's contract status? Is Sarah's contract active? Check Mike's contract
Get attendance history for a member
Show John's attendance history How often has Sarah been coming in? When did Test8 last attend? Show me Mike's recent classes What's Jane's attendance like?
Check in a member for attendance
Check in John Mark Sarah as present Test8 just arrived Sign in Mike for class Check in Jane Doe
Check out a member from attendance
Check out John Mark Sarah as done for today Test8 is leaving Sign out Mike Jane is heading home
Enroll a member in a class session

Enroll John in today's Advanced Sparring Sign Sarah up for the 6pm Fundamentals session Add Test8 to this morning's class Book Mike into the Kids Karate session today Enroll Jane in the next available class
Remove a member from a class session
Remove John from today's class Unenroll Sarah from Advanced Sparring Take Test8 off the session Cancel Mike's enrollment Drop Jane from this morning's class
Promote a member to a new belt rank
Promote John to blue belt Advance Sarah to the next rank Test8 earned their green stripe Move Mike up to purple belt Promote Jane to her next belt level
Create a new subscription for a member

Create a monthly subscription for John Sign Sarah up for the unlimited plan Add Test8 to the family membership Set up a yearly plan for Mike Start a new subscription for Jane Create a contract for John Sign Sarah up for a contract Set up a new contract for Mike
Cancel John's subscription End Sarah's membership Stop Test8's plan Terminate Mike's subscription Cancel Jane's membership plan Cancel John's contract End Sarah's contract Terminate Mike's contract
Send a message to a member's guardian

Message John's parent about his progress Email Sarah's guardian about the upcoming test Send a note to Test8's mom Contact Mike's parents about his attendance Let Jane's guardian know about the schedule change
Create a new member named John Smith Add a new student Sarah Jones Register new member Test8 Create a profile for Mike Williams Add a new student Jane Doe with email jane@example.com
Update John's email to john@example.com Change Sarah's phone number Update Test8's name Edit Mike's contact information Update Jane's profile details
Create a new Advanced Sparring session Add a class session for Kids Karate tomorrow Schedule a new Fundamentals class for 6pm Create an extra session for Adult BJJ on Friday
Cancel today's Advanced Sparring Cancel the 6pm Fundamentals class Call off the Kids Karate session Cancel this morning's class Take the Adult BJJ session off the schedule
Undo the most recent undoable action
Undo that Undo the last action Revert what I just did Go back on that That was a mistake, undo it
Add a member to a course's permanent roster, allowing them to join any session of that class. This is different from member_enroll which reserves a single session spot.
Add Test8 to the Advanced Sparring roster Add John to the Adult Fundamentals course Enroll Sarah in the Kids Karate course roster Put Mike on the course roster for Intermediate BJJ
Register a member for an upcoming belt test event, specifying the target belt rank they are testing for
Register Test8 for a blue belt test Schedule a belt test for John testing for green belt Add Sarah to the next belt test for purple belt Sign Mike up for his yellow stripe belt test
Register {member_name} for a belt test (testing for {target_belt})?
Find active members who have not attended in a given number of days
Who hasn't been in for 2 weeks? Show me at-risk members Which members are inactive? Who hasn't come in lately?
List active subscriptions whose end_date falls within the next N days (default 30)

What subscriptions are ending? Which contracts are expiring soon? How many contracts are ending this month? Show me expiring memberships Who has a contract ending soon? List subscriptions expiring in the next 30 days Any contracts about to expire? Which members are up for renewal?
Look up recent marketing campaign statistics including how many people were reached
How many people did we reach last campaign? Show me campaign stats How many emails went out this week? What's the status of our campaigns?
List marketing cards currently published on the kiosk
What marketing cards are on the kiosk? Show me active marketing cards What's being shown on the kiosk right now?
Pause Alex's membership Put Sarah's subscription on hold Suspend John's membership temporarily Pause Alex's contract Put Sarah's contract on hold Suspend John's contract
Resume Alex's membership Reactivate Sarah's subscription Unpause John's membership Resume Alex's contract Reactivate Sarah's contract Unpause John's contract
Create a new marketing campaign targeting members
Create a campaign for all active members Set up a summer camp email blast Create a new SMS campaign called Back to School
Activate a draft marketing campaign so it will send on the next scheduled run
Send the summer camp campaign now Activate the welcome campaign Launch our back to school campaign
Activate campaign '{campaign_name}' and queue it for sending?
Schedule a social media post to be published at a future date and time
Schedule a post for next Monday about belt testing Queue a Facebook post for Friday about summer camp Schedule our promotion post for Saturday morning
Create a new dojo program (e.g., Kids Karate Gold, Adult BJJ)
Create a new program called Adult Kickboxing Add a program for Competition Team Create the Tiny Titans program for toddlers
Register a member for a belt test by creating a member.rank record
Register John for a blue belt test Sign Sarah up to test for green stripe Add Test8 to the purple belt test
Create a new class template (e.g., Fundamentals, Advanced Sparring)
Create a class template called Fundamentals for the Kids Program Add a new Sparring class to Adult BJJ Create the Advanced Forms class template
Enroll a member in a specific class session
Enroll John in today's class Add Sarah to the 6pm session Sign up Test8 for this morning's class Put Mike in the Friday evening session
Remove a member from a specific class session
Remove John from today's class Cancel Sarah's enrollment in the 6pm session Drop Test8 from this morning's class Unenroll Mike from Friday's session
Create a new belt test event/session
Create a belt test for March 30th Schedule a test event for Saturday Create a new belt test called Spring Grading
Manually create an attendance log entry
Log attendance for John at 5pm Create an attendance entry for Sarah Record Test8's check-in at 3:30pm
Record a credit transaction (grant, hold, or adjust credits)
Add 5 credits to John's account Deduct 2 credits from Sarah Adjust Test8's credits for makeup class
Create an email campaign for summer camp Start a recurring campaign called Monthly Newsletter Create an SMS blast for active members
Create a post for social media
Post about our new program on Facebook Create an Instagram post about belt testing Draft a social media post about our schedule
Update John's instructor profile Set Sarah's speciality to karate Update Mike's bio to highlight his BJJ experience
Add an emergency contact for a member
Add Jane Smith as emergency contact for John Record his mother's phone number as backup contact Add Sarah's guardian contact information
Add a new martial art style to the system
Add Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu as a martial art style Create a new style called Muay Thai Add Taekwondo with code TKD
Create a monthly unlimited plan for $150 Add a new credits-based plan called 10-Pack Set up an annual subscription plan for kids BJJ
Enroll a member into a martial arts program
Enroll John in the Kids BJJ program Add Sarah to the Adult Karate program Sign up Test8 for Fundamentals starting today
Register a member for a specific belt test event
Register John for the Spring belt test Sign up Sarah for the upcoming grading event Add Test8 to belt test #5
Create a marketing card for kiosk or portal display
Create a marketing card for summer camp Add a promo card for the kiosk about new classes Create a portal card about our belt testing schedule
Create an announcement to display on the kiosk
Create a kiosk announcement about holiday hours Post a notice about the upcoming tournament Add an announcement about schedule changes
Create an auto-enrollment rule for a member in a class template
Auto-enroll John in all Fundamentals classes Set up Sarah for automatic enrollment in Kids BJJ Enable auto-enrollment for Test8 in Advanced Sparring
List my project tasks and instructor todos
Show my tasks What tasks do I have? What's on my to-do list? Show overdue tasks What tasks are due this week? Show my instructor todos What do I need to follow up on?
Create a new project task or instructor todo

Create a task: follow up with John's parents Add a to-do: call Mike about missed classes, due Friday Create high priority task: prepare belt test roster for Saturday Make a task to review Sarah's attendance this week Add reminder to send tournament info to parents
Mark task "follow up with John" as done Complete the task about Mike's attendance I finished the belt test roster task Mark done: call parents about tournament Check off the task about Sarah
Update a task's deadline, priority, or add a note

Move the belt test task deadline to next Friday Update task "call parents" with a note: left voicemail Change the deadline on the roster task to Saturday Add a note to the John follow-up task: meeting confirmed
What's on my calendar today? What's on my calendar this week? Show calendar events for tomorrow Do I have any meetings this week? What events are scheduled for next week? Show my schedule for today

Create a calendar event tomorrow at 3pm: instructor meeting Add a meeting on Friday at 2pm: parent conference Schedule an event next Monday at 10am called belt test prep Put a staff meeting on the calendar for Thursday 4pm Create event: tournament sign-up deadline on April 20th
Cancel and remove a calendar event
Cancel the instructor meeting on Friday Remove the belt test prep event Delete the Thursday 4pm staff meeting Cancel the event called parent conference
Send a direct email to a member, guardian, or contact

Email John's mom: class is cancelled tomorrow Send an email to Sarah's guardian about the belt test Email Mike: great job at the tournament this weekend Send Sarah an email saying she needs to wear her gi next class Write an email to John: your attendance is excellent this month
Send a direct SMS text message to a member or guardian

Text John: don't forget belt test is Saturday Send SMS to Mike's mom: class is starting 30 minutes late today Text Sarah: great performance this week SMS Mike: your uniform needs to be washed before next class Send a text to John: come in early on Friday for sparring prep
Send a mass email to all members (or filtered group)

Email all active members about the tournament next weekend Send a blast email to members: dojo will be closed Monday Email all trial members: sign up by Friday to get the first month free Send an announcement email to everyone about the belt ceremony Create an email campaign for all active students about the new schedule
Send email blast to all {membership_state} members: "{subject}"?
Send a mass SMS text message to all members (or filtered group)

SMS all members: dojo is closed this Saturday Text everyone: belt test is moved to Sunday at noon Send a text blast to active members about the new class schedule SMS all trial members: free week ends Friday, sign up now Text everyone about the tornado drill cancellation
Send SMS blast to all {membership_state} members?
Look up billing/payment status for a specific member or family

Has the Smith family paid? Check if John's invoice is paid Is Sarah's account up to date? What's the payment status for the Johnson family? Has Mike paid this month? Is there an outstanding balance for the Garcias?
List invoices filtered by payment status
Show overdue invoices Which families haven't paid? List all unpaid invoices Show me who is behind on payments Who has overdue bills? Show unpaid accounts List paid invoices this month
What follow-ups do I have? Show my scheduled activities What calls do I need to make? Show overdue activities What reminders do I have this week? List my pending follow-ups
Schedule a follow-up activity (call, email reminder, meeting, etc.)

Schedule a follow-up call with John's parents next Tuesday Remind me to check Sarah's attendance on Friday Create an activity: send welcome email to new trial students by Monday Set a reminder to prepare belt test certificates for Saturday Add a follow-up activity for Mike: discuss attendance issues
List upcoming or past belt tests, optionally filtered by program
When is the next belt test? Show upcoming belt tests List all belt tests What belt tests do we have for BJJ? TKD belt test schedule
List who is registered for an upcoming belt test
Who is registered for the belt test? Who signed up for belt testing? Belt test registrations Is John registered for the next test? Who's testing next?
List all active programs offered at the dojo
What programs do we offer? List all programs Show me our programs What martial arts programs are available? What can students enroll in?
List class templates (recurring course types), optionally filtered by program
Show all courses List class types What courses are available? Show BJJ courses Karate class templates
Look up who is enrolled in a program or which programs a member is enrolled in
Who is enrolled in BJJ? Show John's program enrollments What programs is Sarah enrolled in? List enrollments for Taekwondo Show active enrollments
Check the onboarding progress of a member or list members who have not completed onboarding
What is John's onboarding status? Who hasn't finished onboarding? Show onboarding progress for Sarah Is Mike fully onboarded? List incomplete onboardings
Check a member's points balance and transaction history
How many points does John have? What's Sarah's points balance? Show Maria's points history How many reward points does Mike have? Points for John Smith
Check a member's credit balance and credit transaction history
How many credits does John have? What's Sarah's credit balance? Show Mike's credits Credit history for Maria Does John have any credits on account?
Look up the household and family members linked to a contact

Who's in John's household? Show me Sarah's family What family members are linked to Mike? Show the Smith household Who is the guardian for this student? List all households View households Show me all families
List auto-enrollment rules for members or courses
Show auto-enroll rules Who has auto-enrollment set up? What is John auto-enrolled in? List all auto-enrollment schedules Show John's auto-enroll preferences
List AI calling campaigns and their status
Show all campaigns What campaigns are running? List active calling campaigns Show me our campaigns What outreach campaigns do we have?
List announcements currently displayed on the kiosk
Show kiosk announcements What's displayed on the kiosk? List current announcements What announcements are active?
List recent or scheduled social media posts
Show recent social media posts What have we posted lately? List scheduled posts Are there any failed social posts? Show social media errors
List members with birthdays coming up in the next N days
Who has a birthday coming up? Any birthdays this week? Show upcoming birthdays Birthdays in the next 30 days Who has a birthday today?
Show a summary of all things the AI assistant can help with
What can you do? What tools are connected? What commands are available? Show me your capabilities What can I ask you? List available actions What do you support? Help
Answer a question about how to use the AI assistant or a specific feature
How do I enroll a student? How do I check someone in? How does belt promotion work? How do I create a class? Explain the subscription system How do I send a blast email?
List sale orders, optionally filtered by state or partner
Show all sales orders List open quotes What orders do we have? Show confirmed orders Sales orders this month
Look up details of a specific sale order
Show details for order S00042 Look up sale order for John Smith What's in order S00010? Show me the latest order for ABC Corp Find order by customer name
Create a new sale order for a customer
Create a sale order for John Smith New order for ABC Corp Make a quote for Sarah Start a new sales order for Mike
Confirm order S00042 Activate the quote for John Confirm the sale order Mark S00010 as confirmed
Cancel order S00042 Cancel the quote for John Cancel sale order S00010
Send a sale order/quote by email to the customer
Send order S00042 to the customer Email the quote to John Send sale order by email Dispatch order S00010
List products available in the catalog
Show all products List our products What do we sell? Show products in the merchandise category What's in our catalog?
Look up details for a specific product
What's the price of the gi? Look up the BJJ belt product Show me details for the uniform How much does the rashguard cost?
List point-of-sale orders for today or a given date
Show today's POS orders List point of sale transactions What were today's sales? Show POS orders for this week How many POS orders today?
Look up details of a specific POS order by reference or customer
Look up POS order 00042 Find the receipt for John Smith Show details for POS transaction Look up today's order for Sarah
List POS sessions and their status
Show POS sessions Is the register open? What POS sessions are active? List open POS sessions Show closed sessions today
Open a new POS session for a register
Open the register Start a POS session Open the front desk POS Open point of sale
Open a new POS session for {config_name}?
Close the register End the POS session Close point of sale for today Close the front desk session
Get a daily revenue and transaction summary from POS
How much did we make today? Show today's POS summary What's the daily total? POS revenue for today How many transactions did we do today?
Create an invoice for John Smith Make a new invoice for ABC Corp Invoice Sarah for this month Generate a bill for Mike
Send a posted invoice by email to the customer
Send invoice INV/2026/00042 to the customer Email the invoice to John Send the latest invoice for Sarah Dispatch invoice to ABC Corp
List recent payments received or sent
Show recent payments List payments received today What payments came in this week? Show payments for John Smith Recent member payments
Register a payment against an invoice
Mark invoice INV/2026/00042 as paid Register payment for John's invoice Record payment of $150 against invoice Pay off invoice for Sarah
Show the balance for a specific ledger account or overall cash position
What's our cash balance? Show account balance How much is in the bank account? What's the balance on account 1010? Current balance
List vendor bills, optionally filtered by payment status
Show unpaid bills List all vendor bills What bills are overdue? Show bills from this month Any outstanding bills?
Create a bill for ABC Supplies New vendor bill for the gym equipment company Add a bill from our supplier Record a bill from XYZ Corp
List employees, optionally filtered by department
Show all employees List our staff Who works here? Show employees in the instructor department List instructors
Look up details for a specific employee
Show me John's employee record Look up instructor Sarah What department is Mike in? Employee info for Carlos
Add new employee John Smith Create employee record for Sarah New hire: Carlos Rivera, head instructor Add staff member with email
Update an employee's information such as title, department, or contact details
Update Sarah's title to Head Instructor Change John's department to management Update Mike's work email Set Carlos's phone number
Archive (deactivate) an employee who is no longer with the organization
Archive employee John Deactivate Sarah's employee record Mark Mike as no longer employed Remove Carlos from active staff
Archive employee {employee_name}? This will deactivate their record.
List all departments in the organization
Show all departments List departments What departments do we have? Show organizational departments
Create a new department called Operations Add a Youth Programs department New department: Competition Team
Show all channels List messaging channels What channels exist? Show Discuss channels List group chats
Look up details and members of a specific channel
Show me the instructors channel Who's in the general channel? Look up the #announcements channel Show members of the staff chat
Create a new messaging channel in Discuss
Create a channel called Competition Team New group chat for instructors Create a Discuss channel for events Make a new channel: Parent Updates
Post a message to a Discuss channel
Post to the instructors channel: class is cancelled Send a message to general: dojo closed tomorrow Message the staff channel about the schedule change Post announcement to #general
Add a user to a Discuss channel
Add John to the instructors channel Add Sarah to the #staff channel Invite Mike to the competition team chat Add Carlos to the announcements channel
List recent messages from a channel or the inbox
Show recent messages in #general What was said in the instructors channel? Last messages in staff chat Read the latest from #announcements Show my inbox messages
Award dojo points to a member (creates a points transaction)
Award 50 points to John Smith Give Sarah 100 points for helping out Add 25 points to Mike's account Award Jordan bonus points for attendance Give 10 points to Casey for winning the tournament
Deduct dojo points from a member (creates a negative adjustment transaction)
Deduct 20 points from John Smith Remove 50 points from Sarah's account Subtract 10 points from Mike for missing class Take away 100 points from Casey
Deactivate (archive) a member record so they no longer appear in active lists
Archive John Smith Deactivate member Sarah Jones Remove Casey from active members Archive Mike — he moved away Deactivate Jordan's account
Post an internal note to a member's chatter / activity log

Add a note to John Smith: great improvement this week Leave a note on Sarah's profile about her injury Note on Mike: parents want a call back Add internal note for Casey — struggling with back kick Write a note on Jordan's profile
List a member's current/upcoming class session enrollments
What classes is John enrolled in? Show Sarah's class schedule Which sessions does Mike have this week? List Casey's current enrollments What's Jordan signed up for?
Reset billing failure count on a member's subscription so the next billing run retries the charge
Retry billing for John Smith Try billing Casey again Reset billing failure for Sarah Attempt payment again for Mike Retry the failed charge for Jordan
Show available spots in upcoming class sessions
How many spots are left in Tuesday's class? Is there room in the BJJ session? What classes have availability? Show me open slots for this week Which sessions still have space?
List all members enrolled in a specific class session
Who is enrolled in Thursday's class? Show the roster for tonight's BJJ session List everyone signed up for Saturday's class Who's coming to the 6pm session? Show me the class roster
Generate recurring sessions from a class template's recurrence schedule

Generate sessions for BJJ class Create upcoming sessions for the Monday Karate template Generate next month's sessions for Taekwondo Schedule sessions for the kids' class template Create recurring classes for Muay Thai
Add a member to the waitlist for a class session

Add John to the waitlist for BJJ Put Sarah on the waitlist for tonight's class Waitlist Mike for the Saturday session Add Casey to the waitlist — the class is full Put Jordan on standby for Thursday's Karate
Record the result (pass/fail/absent) of a belt test for a specific member.
Mark John as passed the belt test Record that Sarah failed her belt test Log absent for Mike's test Mark Casey as passed with notes: excellent technique Record Jordan's belt test result as pass
Check if a member has enough attendance to test for their next belt rank.

Is John ready to test for his next belt? Can Sarah test for the next rank? Check belt readiness for Mike Is Casey eligible for promotion? How many classes does Jordan need before testing? Is Alex ready for their black belt test?
List open tasks in the Instructor Alerts project (instructor to-do items).
What instructor tasks are open? Show me my to-do list What are the instructor alerts? List all open instructor tasks What needs to be done for instructors today? Any pending instructor tasks?
Mark an instructor task/alert as done/completed.
Mark the equipment check task as done Complete the task "Follow up with John" Close the belt order task Mark "Schedule makeup class" as complete Done with the uniform inventory task
List subscriptions that have billing failures or are in dunning (past-due).
Show me subscriptions with failed payments Who has billing failures? List all dunning subscriptions Which members have past-due payments? Show members with failed billing Who needs billing follow-up?
Summarize paid invoice revenue for a given time period (week, month, quarter, year).

What was our revenue this month? How much did we make this week? Show me monthly revenue Revenue summary for this quarter How much revenue did we generate this year? What is our total income this month?
List recent payments, optionally filtered by member name or date range.
Show me John's payment history What payments did Sarah make? List recent payments When did Mike last pay? Show all payments this month Payment history for Jordan
Report on how many trial prospects converted to members vs dropped off over a period.

How many trials converted this month? Trial conversion rate this week How many new members signed up from trials? Show me the conversion report What's our trial-to-member conversion rate? How many prospects became members this quarter?
Add an internal note or comment to a CRM lead/prospect record.
Add a note to John's lead Leave a note on Sarah's trial record Note on Mike's lead: called but no answer Add comment to the ABC prospect Log a note for Jordan: interested in black belt program
Send a portal login invitation email to a member's guardian/parent so they can access the member portal.

Send portal invite to John's parent Invite Sarah's guardian to the member portal Give Mike's mom portal access Send login link to Jordan's parent Invite the parent of Casey to the portal Set up portal access for Alex's guardian
Send portal invitation to guardian of {member_name}?

List all active members at a given belt rank / color. Use belt_color to filter by rank name (e.g. "blue", "white", "black belt"). Returns member name, rank, membership state, and total sessions attended.
Show me all blue belt members Who has a white belt? List all black belt students Which members are purple belts? How many blue belts do we have? Show everyone at white belt
List members enrolled in today's sessions who haven't checked in yet (attendance_state = pending). Optionally filter to a specific session by name or ID. Results grouped by session.

Which members haven't checked in today? Who still needs to check in? Show me today's pending check-ins Who hasn't arrived yet for today's classes? List members that need to check in Show unchecked members for today's BJJ class
Show the full roster of registrations for a specific belt test. Defaults to the nearest upcoming test. Returns each registered member with their target rank and current result status.

Show the belt test roster Who is registered for the belt test? Show me the belt test list for this month Who's testing for their next belt? List all belt test registrations Show the BJJ belt test roster
List all members who currently have an active subscription (membership_state = active). Does not require a specific member name — retrieves the full active member roster.

List all members with active subscriptions Show me all active members Which members have an active plan? How many members are currently active? Give me the full active member list Show all members with a subscription
List all members filtered by a specific membership state (active, paused, cancelled, trial, lead, expired). Useful for bulk queries like "show all paused members" or "list everyone on trial".
Show all paused members List all cancelled students Who is on trial? Show me all leads List every expired member Which members are currently paused?
List members who were enrolled in a session but were marked as absent. Defaults to today's sessions if no specific session is provided.
Who didn't show up today? Show me today's no-shows Which members were absent? List no-shows for tonight's class Who was marked absent in the BJJ session? Show absentees for today

List active members whose attendance since their last promotion meets or exceeds the threshold required for their next belt test. Optionally filter by program. Returns member name, current rank, attendance count vs. threshold, and completion percentage.

Who is ready for their next belt test? Which members are eligible for promotion? Show me belt-ready students Who has enough classes for their next belt? List members ready to test for the next rank Who can test for their belt in BJJ?
Aggregate count of all subscriptions grouped by state (active, paused, cancelled, expired, etc.). Returns a quick dashboard-style breakdown of subscription health across the entire school.

Give me a subscription breakdown How many active subscriptions do we have? Show me subscription stats What's the breakdown of member subscription states? How many members are paused vs active? Summarize our subscription status How many contracts are active? Give me a contract breakdown
Find the next upcoming class session, optionally for a specific member
What's the next class? When is the next session? What class is coming up next? What's John's next class? When is Sarah's next session? Show me the next 3 classes
Find the most recent past class session(s), optionally for a specific member
What was the last class? When was the previous session? Show me the most recent class What was John's last session? When did Sarah last have class? Show me the previous 3 sessions
Show belt test readiness for all active ranked members. Returns a summary of who is ready to test and who still needs more sessions.

Show belt test readiness for all members Who is ready to test for their next belt? Which members can be promoted? Show me the belt readiness report Who's eligible for belt promotion? Show belt readiness for everyone List all members ready to test
Enroll a member in the next upcoming session of a course they are already part of
Enroll John in their next class session Sign Sarah up for their next class Add Mike to the next available session Enroll Casey in their next BJJ session Put Jordan in the next class
Enroll {member_name} in their next available class session?
